_note: Ordered list of modules the shell should load. The shell dynamically imports each module's module.js and slots them into the grid. Adding a new module = add an entry here + create docs/modules/<id>/. Tiles render in array order.

data_repo.name: worktrace-data-kashish
data_repo._note: Where modules fetch their JSON from. Path within = modules/<module_id>/users/<user_id>.json
